variant_view: Template only: durable treatment demand and high-credit payers may support predictable cash generation and per-share compounding, but reimbursement, labor costs, payer mix and leverage must be verified before any conclusion.

pillars.name: business_truth
warnings: Verify treatment volumes, payer mix and cash conversion.

pillars.name: survival
warnings: Verify debt maturity ladder, interest coverage and refinancing sensitivity.

pillars.name: mispricing
warnings: Document consensus assumptions for reimbursement and labor costs.

pillars.name: value_capture
warnings: Verify executed net buybacks after SBC and debt-funded repurchases.

pillars.name: price_odds
warnings: Run reimbursement, wage and interest-rate stress cases.

payer_economics.leverage_support_assessment: Stable collections may support leverage, but reimbursement pressure, labor inflation, maturity concentration and interest coverage determine the ceiling.

thesis_core_facts: net share count declines without weakening survival

metric_rules.rationale: Leverage can no longer be treated as safely supported.
Payer mix deterioration can impair economics.

add_on_weakness_conditions: reimbursement and leverage stress tests remain acceptable
prohibited_actions: Treat government payment as unlimited pricing power
